1.description: Schema invalid, oracle unstable, outcome preservation failed, fixture pack mismatch, or removed component in EXTENSION/REFINEMENT transition
1.label: INVARIANT_VIOLATION
triggers: semantic reinterpretation: removed component in non-BREAKING transition

2.description: Evidence gate produced non-identical commit or certificate across repeated runs
2.label: DETERMINISM_FAILURE
triggers: gate_3 (determinism) failure: commit or certificate varies across 3 runs

3.description: Gate 4 precondition not met: zero witnesses, fewer than 2 admissible witnesses, or no independent pair
3.label: WITNESS_FAILURE
triggers: fewer than 2 admissible witness records after schema + admissibility filtering
all admitted pairs fail independence rules

4.description: Components declared 'removed' in a transition typed EXTENSION or REFINEMENT
4.label: SEMANTIC_REINTERPRETATION
triggers: artifact_mapping contains 'removed' value and transition_type is EXTENSION or REFINEMENT
